emptyApplication.subtitle: [ES] Start your Indonesian tourist visa application today.

visaTimeline.heading: [ES] Indonesia Tourist Visa B211A
visaTimeline.subheading: [ES] Complete each step to submit your visa application

application.title: [ES] Complete your application
application.subtitle: [ES] Fill in personal info, passport and travel details

documents.title: [ES] Upload your documents
documents.subtitle: [ES] 6 documents required for the B211A tourist visa

submit.title: [ES] Submit application
submit.subtitle: [ES] Review everything and submit to our processing team

decision.title: [ES] Decision
decision.subtitle: [ES] Visa approved and e-visa document sent to you

nextAction.title: [ES] Next action
nextAction.getStartedSub: [ES] Pick up where you left off when you're ready.

journey.subheading: [ES] Here's how the rest of your application unfolds. Estimated time:

ukvi_account.title: [ES] Create UKVI account
ukvi_account.subtitle: [ES] Sign up for a UK Visas & Immigration account to start your application.

form.title: [ES] Online application
form.subtitle: [ES] Fill out the 44-page Standard Visitor application.

pay.title: [ES] Pay visa fee
pay.subtitle: [ES] Pay the UK visa application fee online.

documents.title: [ES] Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: [ES] Upload bank statements, travel plans, and proof of accommodation.

ukvcas.title: [ES] UKVCAS biometrics
ukvcas.subtitle: [ES] Book and attend a biometrics appointment at a UKVCAS centre.

decision.title: [ES] Decision
decision.subtitle: [ES] UKVI reviews your application and returns a decision.

form.title: [ES] Schengen application
form.subtitle: [ES] Complete the harmonized Schengen short-stay application.

documents.title: [ES] Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: [ES] Travel insurance, accommodation, financials, and itinerary.

vfs_appointment.title: [ES] VFS appointment
vfs_appointment.subtitle: [ES] Book an appointment at the relevant VFS Global centre.

biometrics.title: [ES] Biometrics
biometrics.subtitle: [ES] Provide fingerprints and a photo at your appointment.

decision.title: [ES] Decision
decision.subtitle: [ES] The consulate decides on your short-stay visa.

passport_pickup.title: [ES] Passport pickup
passport_pickup.subtitle: [ES] Collect your passport from the VFS centre once ready.

stream_select.title: [ES] Pick visitor stream
stream_select.subtitle: [ES] Choose between Tourist, Business, Sponsored Family, ADS, or Frequent Traveller.

signing.title: [ES] Sign your declaration
signing.subtitle: [ES] Review your character and health declarations and sign them before submission.

pay.title: [ES] Pay visa fee
pay.subtitle: [ES] Pay the visa application charge in ImmiAccount.

biometrics_optional.title: [ES] Biometrics (if required)
biometrics_optional.subtitle: [ES] Some nationalities must provide biometrics at a VAC.

decision.title: [ES] Decision
decision.subtitle: [ES] Home Affairs assesses and issues a decision.

form.title: [ES] E-Visa form
form.subtitle: [ES] Fill out the Vietnam e-Visa application online.

wait_email.title: [ES] Wait for email
wait_email.subtitle: [ES] Vietnam Immigration emails the e-Visa PDF when approved.

print_and_travel.title: [ES] Print and travel
print_and_travel.subtitle: [ES] Print the e-Visa PDF and present it on arrival.

form.title: [ES] DS-160 form
form.subtitle: [ES] Complete the online DS-160 nonimmigrant visa application.

pay.title: [ES] Pay MRV fee
pay.subtitle: [ES] Pay the visa application fee at a designated bank or online.

schedule_interview.title: [ES] Schedule interview
schedule_interview.subtitle: [ES] Book your visa interview at the U.S. embassy or consulate.

documents.title: [ES] Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: [ES] Gather passport, photo, financials, and travel evidence.

interview.title: [ES] Consular interview
interview.subtitle: [ES] Attend your interview at the U.S. consulate or embassy.

passport_pickup.title: [ES] Passport return
passport_pickup.subtitle: [ES] Your passport is mailed or returned for pickup with the visa.

decision.title: [ES] Decision
decision.subtitle: [ES] The consular officer issues a decision after the interview.

form.title: [ES] Application form
form.subtitle: [ES] Complete the Indonesia tourist visa B211A form.

submit.title: [ES] Submit application
submit.subtitle: [ES] Submit through the Indonesia immigration portal.

email_visa.title: [ES] E-Visa email
email_visa.subtitle: [ES] Receive your B211A approval by email.

signing.submittedBody: [ES] We've queued your application for the final submit step.
signing.pageSubtitle: [ES] Review the answers below and sign at the bottom. Your signature is rendered onto the official Subclass 600 declaration before submission.
signing.signSubtitle: [ES] Use your finger, stylus, or mouse. Tap Clear to retry.

services.title: [ES] Services
services.noScheduledDescription: [ES] You don't have any upcoming services. Browse our recommended tests below to get started.
services.noHistoryDescription: [ES] You haven't completed any services yet. Your history will appear here.

supplement.description: [ES] Insider prices on 300+ curated longevity products

advancedBloodPanel.title: [ES] Advanced Blood Panel

glp1.title: [ES] GLP-1 Treatment
glp1.description: [ES] You may be a candidate for GLP-1 service. See how it could help you.

allergyTesting.title: [ES] Food & Environmental Allergy Testing
allergyTesting.description: [ES] Determine your specific food and environmental allergies.

cancerTest.title: [ES] Grail Galleri Multi Cancer Test
cancerTest.description: [ES] Get ahead of your cancer risk with this comprehensive test. Detects over 100 types of cancer.

dexaScan.title: [ES] DEXA Bone Density Scan
dexaScan.description: [ES] Measure your bone density and risk of osteoporosis.

gutMicrobiome.title: [ES] Gut Microbiome Testing
gutMicrobiome.description: [ES] Analyze your gut microbiome to understand your digestive health.

toxicology.title: [ES] Environmental Toxicology Testing
toxicology.description: [ES] Analyze your environmental toxins and exposure.

personalInfo.description: [ES] Full name, date of birth, nationality

review.title: [ES] Review Your Application
review.reviewMessage: [ES] Please review your details carefully before submitting.

validation.hasErrors: [ES] Application has errors — please fix before submitting

photoUpload.title: [ES] Upload Photo
photoUpload.instructions: [ES] Please refer to the Department of State's image requirements. Your photo must be in JPEG format (.jpg), 240KB or less, and taken within the last 6 months.
photoUpload.cropToolDescription: [ES] Use this tool to resize and crop your photo to meet the Department of State's head-size and digital image submission requirements.
photoUpload.formatHint: [ES] Choose a JPEG format image (.jpg file type) that is 240KB or less in file size.
photoUpload.qualityDescription: [ES] To ensure the highest quality photos will be used in the final printed travel document: color photo, plain white or off-white background, full-face view directly facing the camera, neutral facial expression, both eyes open, taken within the last 6 months.
photoUpload.passed: [ES] Photo passed quality standards. Your photo has successfully been uploaded and passed all quality checks.
photoUpload.failed: [ES] The submitted photo did not meet the image quality requirements.
photoUpload.confirmNotice: [ES] Please note that you may be required to bring a passport-like photo to your interview.
photoUpload.uploadError: [ES] Failed to upload photo. Please try again.

failures.wrong_format: [ES] File must be in JPEG format (.jpg)
failures.dimensions_too_small: [ES] Image must be at least 600x600 pixels
failures.not_square: [ES] Image must have a square (1:1) aspect ratio

translation.translationFailed: [ES] Translation could not be completed automatically.

status.title: [ES] Application Submitted
status.message: [ES] Your application has been submitted to the Indonesian e-visa portal. You will receive an email confirmation once your visa is approved. Keep your confirmation number for reference.

declarations.healthLivedOutsidePassport: [ES] Have you lived outside your passport country for more than 5 years (or 3 months in the last year)?
declarations.healthVisitedFacility: [ES] Have you been an inpatient at a hospital or health facility in the last 5 years?
declarations.healthHealthcareWorker: [ES] Are you a healthcare worker (doctor, nurse, paramedic, etc.)?
declarations.healthAgedOrChildcare: [ES] Have you worked in aged-care or childcare in the last 5 years?
declarations.healthClassroom3Months: [ES] Have you spent 3+ consecutive months in a classroom (as student or teacher) in the last 5 years?
declarations.healthTbOrChestXray: [ES] Have you had tuberculosis, an abnormal chest X-ray, or close contact with a TB patient?
declarations.hasHealthInsurance: [ES] Do you have health insurance covering your stay in Australia?
declarations.charCriminalConvictions: [ES] Have you been charged with or convicted of any criminal offence anywhere?
declarations.charWarCrimes: [ES] Have you been involved in war crimes, crimes against humanity, or genocide?
declarations.charSexualOffence: [ES] Have you been charged with or convicted of a sexual offence (including against a child)?
declarations.charTerrorism: [ES] Have you been involved in, or supported, terrorism?
declarations.charPeopleSmuggling: [ES] Have you been involved in people smuggling or human trafficking?
declarations.charMilitaryTraining: [ES] Have you received specialised military, paramilitary, or weapons/explosives training?
declarations.charVisaRefused: [ES] Have you ever been refused a visa for any country, or had a visa cancelled?

declarations.understandsNoEntryGuarantee: [ES] I understand the visa does not guarantee entry — border officers may still refuse entry.

declarations.willLeaveBeforeExpiry: [ES] I undertake to leave Australia before my visa expires.
declarations.genuineVisitor: [ES] I confirm that I am a genuine visitor and intend to stay temporarily for the purpose stated.

identity.scanSubtitle: [ES] Scan your passport to auto-fill, or type the details yourself.
identity.scanOptionHint: [ES] Auto-fills your details from a photo
identity.scanComingSoon: [ES] Coming soon — use manual entry for now
identity.scanInstructions: [ES] Lay the data page flat under good light. We need to read the photo, MRZ, and all printed text.
identity.scanBrowseHint: [ES] JPG, PNG, or WEBP — up to 8 MB
identity.scanExtractError: [ES] We couldn't read this photo. Try a clearer shot or type it manually.
identity.scanResultSubtitle: [ES] Edit anything that looks wrong before continuing.
identity.scanPrivacyNote: [ES] Your scan is encrypted in transit, used only for extraction, and removed after submission.
identity.scanNoDraft: [ES] Couldn't start a draft application. Reload the page and try again.
identity.scanWrongFormat: [ES] Please upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image.
identity.scanTooLarge: [ES] Image is too large — please use one under 8 MB.
identity.scanNotAuthenticated: [ES] Please sign in again to scan your passport.

scanConfidence.low: [ES] Low confidence — please review every field

identity.title: [ES] Your details
identity.subtitle: [ES] Enter these exactly as they appear on your passport.
identity.noStateProvince: [ES] My country of birth has no states/provinces
identity.hasOtherName: [ES] Have you gone by a different name?
identity.hasOtherNameTooltip: [ES] This includes maiden names, religious names, professional names or any other name previously used on official documents. For example: Former name: Wang Xiaohong → Li Xiaohong (after marriage)
identity.hasNativeAlphabet: [ES] Does your name use non-English characters?
identity.hasNativeAlphabetTooltip: [ES] If your passport shows your name in Chinese characters, select 'Yes' and enter it as shown. For example: 张伟 or 李明
identity.hasTelecode: [ES] Do you have a telecode for your name?
identity.hasTelecodeTooltip: [ES] A telecode is a 4-digit number representing a Chinese character. If you know your telecode, select 'Yes' and enter the number. For example: 张 = 1728, 伟 = 0251, 李 = 2621, 明 = 2494

contact.title: [ES] How can the embassy reach you?
contact.subtitle: [ES] Primary contact, home address, and any social profiles required by DS-160.
contact.secondaryPhoneHint: [ES] A second number the embassy can reach you at
contact.mailingSame: [ES] Is your mailing address the same?
contact.socialMediaHint: [ES] DS-160 requires disclosing the platforms you use. Pick any that apply.

passport.title: [ES] Passport & identification
passport.subtitle: [ES] Match what's printed on your passport exactly.
passport.numberHint: [ES] On the passport information page. Usually 8-9 characters.
passport.bookNumberQuestion: [ES] Does your passport have a separate book number?
passport.bookNumberHint: [ES] Only if your passport has a separate book number
passport.bookNumberHelp: [ES] Some passports include an extra number on the inside cover page. Most do not. If unsure, choose "No".
passport.issuedInAnotherCountry: [ES] Was it issued in another country?
passport.extraOtherCitizenship: [ES] Do you hold citizenship of another country?
passport.extraOtherCountryPermanentResidence: [ES] Are you a permanent resident of another country?
passport.extraUsSocialSecurityOrTaxId: [ES] Have you ever had a U.S. social security number or taxpayer ID?
passport.extraNationalityHasPassport: [ES] Do you hold that country's passport?
passport.extraSsnHint: [ES] Only fill this if you had one before (for example, if you previously worked in the U.S.).
passport.extraItinHint: [ES] IRS-issued tax number. Only fill this if you previously filed U.S. taxes.
passport.nationalIdHelp: [ES] Your 18-digit Chinese Resident Identity Card number.
passport.lostPassportQuestion: [ES] Have you ever lost a passport or had one stolen?
passport.lostPassportKnowNumber: [ES] Do you know the passport number?
passport.additionalNationality: [ES] Are you a citizen of any other country?
passport.nationalId: [ES] Do you have a national ID from your country?
passport.nationalIdHint: [ES] e.g. China Resident ID, Indian Aadhaar
passport.lostPassport: [ES] Have you ever lost a passport or had one stolen?

travel.title: [ES] Your trip & U.S. visa history
travel.subtitle: [ES] Rough dates are fine. Most answers here are simple yes/no.
travel.usAddressTitle: [ES] Address where you'll stay in the U.S.
travel.usStayPageTitle: [ES] Where will you stay in the U.S.?
travel.usStayPageSubtitle: [ES] Please provide your accommodation details while in the U.S.
travel.accomContactSubtitle: [ES] Who or where will you be staying with
travel.hotelHint: [ES] You can find the hotel address and phone number in your booking confirmation email or on the hotel's website.
travel.airbnbHint: [ES] Please use the host's name and property address from your Airbnb booking.
travel.accomAddressSubtitle: [ES] The full address of your U.S. accommodation
travel.contactInfoHotelSubtitle: [ES] The hotel's phone and email — not yours
travel.contactInfoFriendsSubtitle: [ES] Your friend or relative's phone and email — not yours
travel.contactInfoDefaultSubtitle: [ES] Their phone and email — not yours
travel.plans: [ES] Do you have specific travel plans?
travel.placesToVisit: [ES] Places you plan to visit in the U.S.
travel.payer: [ES] Who is paying for this trip?
travel.embassyLocationHint: [ES] Usually the U.S. embassy closest to where you live
travel.payerAddressSameAsYou: [ES] Is their address the same as yours?
travel.noPostalCode: [ES] This country has no postal code
travel.previousVisa: [ES] Have you ever been issued a U.S. visa?
travel.previousRefusal: [ES] Have you ever been refused a U.S. visa or admission?
travel.estaDenied: [ES] Have you ever been denied ESTA?
travel.petitionFiled: [ES] Has anyone filed an immigration petition for you?
travel.hasCompanions: [ES] Are there other people traveling with you?
travel.companionGroupTravel: [ES] Are you traveling as part of a group or organization?
travel.hasVisitedOtherCountriesLast5Years: [ES] In the last five years, have you visited any other countries?
travel.unknownLicenseNumber: [ES] I don't know the license number
travel.unknownVisaNumber: [ES] I don't know the visa number
travel.sameVisaType: [ES] Are you applying for the same visa class?
travel.sameCountryApply: [ES] Are you applying in the same country where it was issued?
travel.tenPrinted: [ES] Have your ten fingerprints been taken?
travel.visaLostStolen: [ES] Has your visa ever been lost or stolen?
travel.visaCancelledRevoked: [ES] Has your visa ever been cancelled or revoked?
travel.received221g: [ES] Have you ever received a 221(g) notice?
travel.hasBeenInUs: [ES] Have you ever been to the U.S. before?
travel.hasBeenInUsHint: [ES] Even a short tourist trip counts
travel.hasUsDriversLicense: [ES] Do you hold a U.S. driver's license?

work.title: [ES] Work & education
work.subtitle: [ES] What you do day-to-day — used for the DS-160 employment / study section.
work.jobDutiesPlaceholder: [ES] e.g. Backend development for ad platform
work.hasPreviousEmployer: [ES] Have you had a previous employer?
work.hasAttendedEducation: [ES] Have you attended any school past secondary?

usContact.title: [ES] Your U.S. contact
usContact.subtitle: [ES] A person or organization in the U.S. that knows you. Required for every DS-160.

family.title: [ES] Family & background
family.subtitle: [ES] A few questions about your family — standard for all visa applications.
family.parentSubtitle: [ES] As shown on ID or as best you know
family.fatherUnknown: [ES] I don't know my father's information
family.fatherMarkedUnknown: [ES] Father's information is marked as unknown
family.motherUnknown: [ES] I don't know my mother's information
family.motherMarkedUnknown: [ES] Mother's information is marked as unknown
family.formerSpouseSubtitle: [ES] Provide info for each former spouse (max 5)
family.noPostalCode: [ES] This country has no postal code
family.relativesInUs: [ES] Do you have immediate relatives in the U.S.?
family.relativesInUsHint: [ES] Spouse, fiancé(e), children, siblings, or parents
family.hasOtherRelatives: [ES] Do you have any other relatives in the U.S.?
family.hasOtherRelativesHint: [ES] Cousins, aunts/uncles, in-laws — most select No
family.clanTribe: [ES] Do you belong to a clan or tribe?
family.languagesHint: [ES] Pick all that apply — add more if needed

background.title: [ES] Background & embassy account
background.subtitle: [ES] Most applicants select "none apply". The three security questions at the bottom are required by every DS-160.
background.grounds: [ES] Do any of these apply to you?
background.noneApplyHint: [ES] Health, criminal, security, immigration — all set to No
background.someApplyHint: [ES] You'll be prompted in the full form
background.addMoreInFullForm: [ES] We'll set the obvious questions to No for now. You can edit any of them in the full form review.
background.needAnswerHint: [ES] Choose categories and answer the detailed questions
background.categoryPrompt: [ES] Which categories apply to you? Select all that apply:
background.categoryHealthSubtitle: [ES] Communicable disease, physical or mental disorder, drug abuse
background.categoryCriminalSubtitle: [ES] Arrests, convictions, controlled substance and related violations
background.categorySecuritySubtitle: [ES] Espionage, sabotage, terrorism, and related activity
background.categoryPoliticalSubtitle: [ES] Party membership, Nazi involvement, or persecution
background.categoryImmigrationSubtitle: [ES] Visa fraud, removal, unlawful presence, and custody issues
background.categoryOtherSubtitle: [ES] Public charge, withheld custody, and other grounds

questions.has_communicable_disease: [ES] Do you have a communicable disease of public health significance?
questions.has_physical_mental_disorder: [ES] Do you have a mental or physical disorder that may pose a threat to the safety or welfare of yourself or others?
questions.has_drug_abuse: [ES] Have you ever been a drug abuser or addict?
questions.has_been_arrested: [ES] Have you ever been arrested or convicted for any offense or crime, even though subject of a pardon, amnesty, or other similar action?
questions.has_violated_substance_law: [ES] Have you ever violated, or engaged in a conspiracy to violate, any law relating to controlled substances?
questions.has_prostitution_involvement: [ES] Are you coming to the United States to engage in prostitution or unlawful commercialized vice, or have you been engaged in prostitution or procuring prostitutes within the past 10 years?
questions.has_money_laundering: [ES] Have you ever been involved in, or do you seek to engage in, money laundering?
questions.has_human_trafficking: [ES] Have you ever committed or conspired to commit a human trafficking offense in the United States or outside the United States?
questions.has_supported_trafficking: [ES] Have you ever knowingly aided, abetted, assisted, or colluded with an individual who has committed or conspired to commit a severe human trafficking offense?
questions.is_trafficking_relative: [ES] Are you the child, spouse, son, or daughter of an individual who has committed or conspired to commit a human trafficking offense, and have you knowingly benefited from the trafficking activities in the last five years?
questions.has_been_detained: [ES] Have you ever been detained, retained, or confined by any country?
questions.intends_espionage: [ES] Do you seek to engage in espionage, sabotage, export control violations, or any other illegal activity while in the United States?
questions.intends_terrorism: [ES] Do you seek to engage in terrorist activities while in the United States, or have you ever engaged in terrorist activities?
questions.will_support_terrorists: [ES] Have you ever or do you intend to provide financial assistance or other support to terrorists or terrorist organizations?
questions.is_terrorist_organization_member: [ES] Are you a member or representative of a terrorist organization?
questions.is_terrorist_relative: [ES] Are you the spouse, son, or daughter of an individual who has engaged in terrorist activity that caused harm to another person?
questions.has_committed_genocide: [ES] Have you ever ordered, incited, committed, assisted, or otherwise participated in genocide?
questions.has_committed_torture: [ES] Have you ever committed, ordered, incited, assisted, or otherwise participated in torture?
questions.has_committed_extrajudicial_killings: [ES] Have you committed, ordered, incited, assisted, or otherwise participated in extrajudicial killings, political killings, or other acts of violence?
questions.has_used_child_soldiers: [ES] Have you ever engaged in the recruitment or the use of child soldiers?
questions.violated_religious_freedom: [ES] Have you, while serving as a government official, been responsible for or directly carried out particularly severe violations of religious freedom?
questions.involved_population_control: [ES] Have you ever ordered, incited, committed, assisted, or otherwise participated in forced sterilization?
questions.involved_organ_trafficking: [ES] Have you ever been directly involved in the coercive transplantation of human organs or bodily tissue?
questions.obtained_visa_by_fraud: [ES] Have you ever sought to obtain or assist others to obtain a visa, entry into the United States, or any other United States immigration benefit by fraud or willful misrepresentation?
questions.has_been_removed: [ES] Have you ever been removed or deported from any country?
questions.subject_to_removal_order: [ES] Have you ever been subject to a removal or deportation order from the United States?
questions.failed_removal_hearing: [ES] Have you ever failed to attend a removal or deportation hearing in the United States?
questions.has_overstayed: [ES] Have you ever been unlawfully present in the United States or violated the terms of entry?
questions.withheld_child_custody: [ES] Have you ever withheld custody of a U.S. citizen child outside the United States from a person granted legal custody by a U.S. court?
questions.voted_illegally: [ES] Have you voted in the United States in violation of any law or regulation?
questions.renounced_citizenship: [ES] Have you ever renounced United States citizenship for the purposes of avoiding taxation?

background.embassySubtitle: [ES] Used to create your embassy account. Pick answers you'll remember.
background.birthCity: [ES] What city were you born in?
background.favoriteFood: [ES] What is your least favorite food?

workEducation.title: [ES] Work & education
workEducation.subtitle: [ES] Tell us about your current work, studies, and recent history.
workEducation.currentSubtitle: [ES] Used for the DS-160 work/education/training section.
workEducation.educationDetailsSubtitle: [ES] Add your current school or university information.
workEducation.occupationOtherExplainPlaceholder: [ES] Please explain your occupation or situation...
workEducation.monthlySalaryHint: [ES] Currency is for reference. Only submit the number.
workEducation.noMonthlySalary: [ES] I do not have a fixed monthly income
workEducation.jobDutiesPlaceholder: [ES] e.g. Manage client accounts and prepare reports
workEducation.previousEmployerTitle: [ES] Any other work in the last 5 years?
workEducation.previousEmployerSubtitle: [ES] Add 1-2 recent jobs and fill what you remember.
workEducation.hasPreviousEmployer: [ES] Have you had a previous employer?
workEducation.educationSubtitle: [ES] If you attended school beyond elementary level, add it here.
workEducation.educationHistorySubtitle: [ES] We only need your highest or most recent schooling. Keep it simple.
workEducation.noEducationHint: [ES] No education history to report? Select No and continue.
workEducation.organizationSubtitle: [ES] Professional, social, or charitable organizations. Names are enough.
workEducation.militaryTitle: [ES] Have you ever served in the military?
workEducation.militarySubtitle: [ES] Any country, any branch, including reserve service.
workEducation.specializedSkillsSubtitle: [ES] For example firearms, explosives, nuclear, biological, or chemical experience.
workEducation.specializedSkillsExplainPlaceholder: [ES] Describe your specialized skills or training...

inviteFriends.referDescription: [ES] Share your unique referral link with friends and family. When they sign up, you'll each receive ₱9,999 to spend in VIZA Services.

share.title: [ES] Share your unique link
share.description: [ES] Invite your friends to join VIZA using your unique referral link

give.title: [ES] Give ₱9,999 to your friends
give.description: [ES] When your friends join VIZA, they get ₱9,999 to spend in the VIZA Services

earn.title: [ES] Earn ₱9,999 in credit
earn.description: [ES] You'll also receive ₱9,999 for every friend who signs up with your link.

redeem.title: [ES] Redeem your credits
redeem.description: [ES] Use your credits in the VIZA Services page.

whenReward.question: [ES] When do I get my reward?
whenReward.answer: [ES] Your reward will be credited to your account within 24 hours after your friend completes their first purchase.

howUseCredit.question: [ES] How do I use the credit?
howUseCredit.answer: [ES] Credits can be applied at checkout when purchasing any service from VIZA Services page.

whoEligible.question: [ES] Who's eligible?
whoEligible.answer: [ES] New members only. One discount per new member.

settings.title: [ES] Settings
settings.subtitle: [ES] Manage payment preferences, reusable visa profile details, account security, and support links from one place.

profile.completionHint: [ES] Complete this once so VIZA can prefill repeated visa questions.

universalInfo.title: [ES] Universal profile
universalInfo.description: [ES] Edit reusable identity, passport, contact, and address details.

account.title: [ES] Personal details
account.description: [ES] Review the information VIZA uses to prepare your applications.

travelers.title: [ES] Frequent travelers
travelers.description: [ES] Add family, colleagues, or companions so future group orders can reuse them.

language.title: [ES] Language
language.description: [ES] Use the language switcher in the top bar, or read the profile guide.

paymentMethods.title: [ES] Payment method setup
paymentMethods.description: [ES] See how to add or update card, bank transfer, or WeChat Pay arrangements.

billing.title: [ES] Receipts and invoices
billing.description: [ES] Open billing history, receipts, invoice requests, and refund visibility.

helpCenter.title: [ES] Help center
helpCenter.description: [ES] Read account, payment, privacy, and application support articles.

feedback.title: [ES] Share feedback
feedback.description: [ES] Send a support request if something needs human follow-up.

card.title: [ES] Card
card.description: [ES] Preferred for hosted checkout and receipt tracking.

bank_transfer.title: [ES] Bank transfer
bank_transfer.description: [ES] Use support-assisted transfer details for larger cases.

wechat_pay.title: [ES] WeChat Pay
wechat_pay.description: [ES] Use Chinese payment flow when it is available for the package.

travelers.title: [ES] Frequent travelers
travelers.description: [ES] Save people who often travel with you. These details are not submitted automatically; they are ready for future group-order selection.
travelers.formHint: [ES] Name, nationality, and passport details are the most useful fields for future group applications.
travelers.emptyDescription: [ES] Add family, colleagues, or travel companions now so they can be selected later.
travelers.loadError: [ES] We could not load your frequent travelers right now.
travelers.saveError: [ES] We could not save this traveler. Check the name and try again.
travelers.deleteError: [ES] We could not delete this traveler right now.
travelers.handoffHint: [ES] When group-order forms are connected, these travelers can be added as companion applicants under one order.

deleteDialog.title: [ES] Delete this traveler?
deleteDialog.description: [ES] This removes {name} from frequent travelers. Existing applications are not deleted automatically.

security.title: [ES] Security settings
security.description: [ES] Use a strong password you do not reuse elsewhere. Official support will never ask for it.
security.mismatch: [ES] The two passwords do not match.
security.tooShort: [ES] Password must be at least 8 characters.
security.failed: [ES] Could not update the password. Please try again.

signOut.title: [ES] Sign Out
signOut.description: [ES] Sign out of your account on this device.

billing.title: [ES] Billing
billing.noPaymentDescription: [ES] Billing and payment management will be available here soon. Contact support if you need to update your billing details.

help.heroSubtitle: [ES] Find answers, guides, and support for your account.

accountProfile.title: [ES] Account & Profile
accountProfile.description: [ES] Update your profile details, password, and preferences.

referrals.title: [ES] Referrals
referrals.description: [ES] Invite friends and track your rewards.

resetPassword.question: [ES] How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.answer: [ES] Go to Settings and open the Security section to reset your password. Enter your current password and then your new password twice to confirm. Changes take effect immediately.

seeCredits.question: [ES] Where can I see my credits?
seeCredits.answer: [ES] Credits appear in the Billing section of your Settings page and are also displayed at checkout before you confirm a purchase.

referrals.question: [ES] How do referrals work?
referrals.answer: [ES] Share your unique referral link from the Refer Your Friends page. When a friend signs up and completes their first purchase, you both receive ₱9,999 in credits to use on VIZA services.

bookBloodTest.question: [ES] How do I book a blood test?
bookBloodTest.answer: [ES] Navigate to the Services tab and select the blood panel that matches your goals. Follow the booking flow to choose a date and time. You can view and manage upcoming bookings in the Scheduled tab.

labResults.question: [ES] When will I receive my results?
labResults.answer: [ES] Results are typically available within 3–5 business days after your blood draw. You'll receive a notification when your report is ready, and you can view it in the Data tab.

updateInfo.question: [ES] How do I update my personal information?
updateInfo.answer: [ES] Go to Settings and select the Profile tab. You can update your name, date of birth, phone number, and address. Tap Save to apply changes.

updatePayment.question: [ES] How do I add or update a payment method?
updatePayment.answer: [ES] Billing and payment method management are currently handled offline. Please contact our support team to update your billing details.

cancelReschedule.question: [ES] Can I cancel or reschedule a booked service?
cancelReschedule.answer: [ES] Yes. Open the Services tab and go to Scheduled bookings. Select the booking you want to manage and follow the prompts to reschedule or cancel.

dataPrivate.question: [ES] Is my health data private?
dataPrivate.answer: [ES] Yes. Your health data is stored securely and is only accessible to you and your assigned visa team. We never sell personal health information to third parties.

contactSupport.question: [ES] How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer: [ES] You can reach our support team through the Concierge tab in the app for real-time assistance, or by emailing us directly at support@viza.com.

login.title: [ES] Login to your account
login.registeredSuccess: [ES] Your account is ready. Sign in with your password or get a login code.

login.notRegistered: [ES] This email is not registered as an applicant.
login.unexpectedError: [ES] An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
login.clickLink: [ES] Click the link in your email to sign in.

signup.title: [ES] Request your account
signup.subtitle: [ES] Enter your email and our team will send an invite if you are eligible.

signup.acceptRequired: [ES] Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.

signup.passwordRequirementError: [ES] Password must include letters, numbers, and a special symbol.
signup.passwordMismatch: [ES] The two passwords do not match.
signup.unexpectedError: [ES] Could not create your account. Please try again.
signup.thankYou: [ES] Thanks. We will email you if you are eligible for access.
signup.urgentAccess: [ES] For urgent access, contact support at support@viza.com.

register.noReferralCode: [ES] No referral code found. Please use a valid referral link to sign up.

terms.title: [ES] Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: [ES] The rules and guidelines that govern your use of our platform.

acceptance.title: [ES] Acceptance of terms
acceptance.p1: [ES] By accessing or using the VIZA platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
acceptance.p2: [ES] These terms apply to all users of the platform, including users, registered members, and any visitors who access our services.

services.title: [ES] Our services
services.intro: [ES] VIZA provides a visa services platform that connects users with licensed visa professionals for consultations, lab bookings, health assessments, and related wellness services.
services.item1: [ES] Online visa consultations with licensed consultants.
services.item2: [ES] Blood panel bookings and lab result delivery.
services.item3: [ES] Supplement and product purchases through the Services marketplace.
services.item4: [ES] Personalized action plans and health recommendations.
services.item5: [ES] Concierge support for your health journey.
services.disclaimer: [ES] Our platform is not a substitute for emergency visa care. If you are experiencing a visa emergency, please contact your local emergency services immediately.

eligibility.title: [ES] Eligibility
eligibility.intro: [ES] To use our services, you must:
eligibility.item1: [ES] Be at least 18 years of age, or have parental or guardian consent.
eligibility.item2: [ES] Provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering.
eligibility.item3: [ES] Maintain the security of your account credentials.
eligibility.item4: [ES] Reside in a location where our services are available.

responsibilities.title: [ES] User responsibilities
responsibilities.intro: [ES] When using our platform, you agree to:
responsibilities.item1: [ES] Provide truthful and complete health information during consultations and questionnaires.
responsibilities.item2: [ES] Follow visa advice provided by our licensed professionals responsibly.
responsibilities.item3: [ES] Not share your account credentials with any other person.
responsibilities.item4: [ES] Not use the platform for any unlawful or unauthorized purpose.
responsibilities.item5: [ES] Notify us promptly if you suspect any unauthorized access to your account.

visa.title: [ES] Visa disclaimer
visa.p1: [ES] The visa services on our platform are provided by independently licensed physicians and visa services professionals. VIZA facilitates access to these professionals but does not itself practice medicine.
visa.p2: [ES] Health information provided through our platform is for informational purposes and does not replace professional visa advice, diagnosis, or service. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have.

payments.title: [ES] Payments and credits
payments.p1: [ES] By making a purchase on our platform, you authorize us to charge your selected payment method for the applicable fees. All prices are shown in Philippine Pesos (PHP).
payments.p2: [ES] Credits earned through referrals or promotions have no cash value and cannot be transferred.
payments.p3: [ES] Refunds are subject to our Refund Policy and applicable Philippine consumer protection laws.
payments.p4: [ES] Subscription fees (if any) are billed in advance and are non-refundable except as required by law.

ip.title: [ES] Intellectual property
ip.p1: [ES] All content, features, and functionality on the VIZA platform—including text, graphics, logos, and software—are the exclusive property of VIZA and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written permission.

liability.title: [ES] Limitation of liability
liability.p1: [ES] To the fullest extent permitted by law, VIZA shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, our services. Our total liability to you for any claim arising under these terms shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve months prior to the claim.

termination.title: [ES] Termination
termination.p1: [ES] We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the platform at our discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.
termination.p2: [ES] You may close your account at any time by contacting our support team. Termination does not affect any rights or obligations that arose prior to the termination date.

changes.title: [ES] Changes to these terms
changes.p1: [ES] We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated terms on this page. Continued use of our platform after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

law.title: [ES] Governing law
law.p1: [ES] These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of the Philippines. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Philippines.

contact.title: [ES] Contact us
contact.p1: [ES] If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through the Concierge section of your VIZA account or email us at legal@viza.com.

privacy.title: [ES] Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: [ES] How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: [ES] Introduction
introduction.p1: [ES] VIZA ('we', 'our', or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform and related services.
introduction.p2: [ES] By accessing or using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. Please read it carefully before using our platform.

collect.title: [ES] Information we collect
collect.intro: [ES] We collect information that you provide directly to us and information generated through your use of our services.
collect.item1: [ES] Personal identifiers such as your name, email address, phone number, and date of birth.
collect.item2: [ES] Health and visa information including results, profile data, visa history, allergies, and current documents.
collect.item3: [ES] Payment information processed securely through our payment providers.
collect.item4: [ES] Communications between you and our visa team, including consultation notes and messages.
collect.item5: [ES] Device and usage data such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

use.title: [ES] How we use your information
use.intro: [ES] We use the information we collect to deliver and improve our services, including:
use.item1: [ES] Providing visa services consultations, lab bookings, and service services.
use.item2: [ES] Communicating with you about your health, appointments, and orders.
use.item3: [ES] Processing payments and fulfilling orders through our platform.
use.item4: [ES] Improving the accuracy and quality of our health assessments.
use.item5: [ES] Complying with applicable laws, regulations, and visa standards.
use.noSell: [ES] We never sell your personal or health information to third parties for marketing purposes.

sharing.title: [ES] Sharing your information
sharing.intro: [ES] We may share your information only in the following limited circumstances:
sharing.item1: [ES] With licensed visa professionals involved in your care.
sharing.item2: [ES] With trusted service providers (e.g., labs, pharmacies) necessary to fulfill your orders.
sharing.item3: [ES] With payment processors to complete transactions securely.
sharing.item4: [ES] When required by law, court order, or applicable regulation.
sharing.item5: [ES] With your explicit consent for any other purpose.

security.title: [ES] Data security
security.p1: [ES] We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These include encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access controls, and regular security reviews.
security.p2: [ES] While we take all reasonable precautions, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We encourage you to protect your account credentials and notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.

rights.title: [ES] Your rights
rights.intro: [ES] You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
rights.access: [ES] Access: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
rights.correction: [ES] Correction: Request that inaccurate or incomplete information be corrected.
rights.deletion: [ES] Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information, subject to legal and visa record retention obligations.
rights.portability: [ES] Portability: Request your data in a machine-readable format where applicable.
rights.withdrawal: [ES] Withdrawal of consent: Withdraw consent for non-essential data processing at any time.

retention.title: [ES] Data retention
retention.p1: [ES] We retain your personal and health information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with applicable laws. Visa records may be retained for a minimum period as required by Philippine visa regulations.

changes.title: [ES] Changes to this policy
changes.p1: [ES] We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: [ES] Contact us
contact.p1: [ES] If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact our team through the Concierge section of your VIZA account or email us at privacy@viza.com.
